Description: Summon your micro rover minion. Won't be moving mountains, but can handle pebbles with aplomb.
Description{Enhanced}: This miniaturized model of a utility vehicle used in the Cosmic Exploration Initiative was produced for the amusement of young children. While it faithfully incorporates all the functions of the original machine and can perform various tasks, it lacks the power to move anything beyond pebbles.
Tooltip:
Want a ride on the moon rover?
   - Drivingway
SpecialAction{Description}: Reduces action points of all enemies within range by 50% of the maximum value.
